framework.name: Recursive delegation explicitly unsolved
framework.description: OpenID explicitly lists 'Recursive Delegation in Dynamic Agent Networks' as a future use case (Section 4.4) and 'Delegated Authorization and Transitive Trust' (Section 3.2) as an open problem. This is the standards body itself admitting hop-2+ has no standard solution — not a vendor reinventing, but the governing body acknowledging the gap.
framework.raw_quote: Agents spawning sub-agents or communicating tasks to other agents create complex authorization chains without clear scope attenuation mechanisms.

source.title: Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
